title: DarkGuis
description: This Texture Pack is a Rework of all Guis every Gui is now Dark
body:
No need to worry about the Light anymore!!!
**Now you can turn on Dark Mode Every Gui is dark.**
If I maked Mistakes tell me so i can rework it.
This Texture Pack in cureently in Beta which means bugs can be there.
The Texture Pack changes The Gui to dark mode which means it is now dark.
It is only Visuals.
![New Crafting Table Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59f3f8b08cbea33a92c85edf2a0df65e3ac00d21.png)
